sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-03-12 06:10
- Distance: 7 km
- Moving time: 41:33
- Elapsed time: 41:33
- Elevation gain: 36.4 m
- Average heart rate: 159.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 170 bpm
- Average watts: 192.4 W
- Average speed: 10.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `157.4 bpm`, ranging from `153.0` to `163.4 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `158.4 bpm` and second-half average HR was `156.5 bpm` (-1.9 bpm), which reads as broadly stable across the run.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `162.5 spm`, with a working range of `158.1` to `164.5 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `164.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `160.9 spm` (-3.2 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:56 /km` across `7.006 km` in `41:33` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:43 /km` and second-half pace was `6:08 /km` (+24 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `159.3 bpm` average and `170 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `155.9 bpm` in the first half and `162.6 bpm` in the second (+6.7 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `41:33` out of `41:33` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `59.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `0.6 m` and `14.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `26.4 m` in the first half and `32.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
